safe-3 A+ tight; frequency-is-the-enemy: highest per-trade, lowest n.

result.note: directional out-earns harvester on its own chop days

notes: Loosening past L2 bleeds theta, worst on every axis. Cross off as the -EV far end.
Mechanical/external/timing veins all DRY (~64 families). Theta kills BOUGHT premium -> the live pivot is SELL premium / spread-ify (D1 structure).

Real OPRA fills, n=61 over 55 trading days, total=+$3998.98, OOS-positive. Despite +EV and 57% WR, edge_capture is NEGATIVE (-$204, -13% of max) -> fails OP-16 floor (771). wf=0.081 also fails the 0.70 gate; validation FAIL. The chart/level catastrophe cap lets winners run (high exp/WR) but the engine MISSES J anchor winners and/or eats loser days, so it does not capture J edge. CROSSED_OFF: +EV but churns against the J-anchor metric. Identical to control:pct_-50 (both premium_stop_pct=-0.50).

Real OPRA fills, n=63 over 55 trading days, total=+$2324.64, OOS-positive. Tight -8% stop cuts maxDD to -$348 (best DD of the control row) and keeps total positive, but WR collapses to 27% (theta trap) and edge_capture is still NEGATIVE (-$47) -> OP-16 REJECT. wf=0.113 fails the 0.70 gate; validation FAIL. CROSSED_OFF: marginally +EV but does not capture J edge.

Real OPRA fills, n=61, total=+$3998.98. BYTE-IDENTICAL to OTM-3:control:chart_level by construction (both set premium_stop_pct=-0.50). edge_capture NEGATIVE (-$204) -> OP-16 REJECT; wf=0.081 fails 0.70; validation FAIL. CROSSED_OFF.

Real OPRA fills, n=145 over 123 trading days, total=+$4554.03, OOS-positive. L2 gate patch lifts edge_capture ABOVE the 771 floor (EC=$784, 51% of max) and roughly doubles trade count vs control. BUT wf=0.532 < 0.70 -> PROMOTE gate FAILS; validation FAIL. maxDD=-$1132 worst of OTM-3 row. HOLD. Identical to L2:pct_-50.

Real OPRA fills, n=157 over ~123 trading days, total=+$2938, OOS-positive, validation PASS. THE STANDOUT CELL of OTM-3. edge_capture=$1003 (65% of max) AND wf=1.317 AND OOS-positive -> all three PROMOTE conditions. Tight -8% stop caps maxDD at -$548. WR 19% theta-trap but expectancy +$19/trade, edge_capture is the authority (C4/L48). REPRODUCED, GAMMA_RISK_GATE_ASSERT=1 ON, exit=0. trades_per_day=1.276 NOT an overtrade.
Real OPRA fills, n=145, total=+$4554.03, OOS-positive. BYTE-IDENTICAL to OTM-3:L2:chart_level (both premium_stop_pct=-0.50). edge_capture=$784 clears OP-16 but wf=0.532 < 0.70 -> FAIL. HOLD.

Real OPRA fills, risk-gate assert ON. n=63, total=+$4793.72, OOS-positive, but edge_capture=-$517 (-34% of max, OP-16 REJECT) AND validation FAIL (wf=0.213). High aggregate +EV from non-anchor days. IDENTICAL to OTM-2:control:pct_-50. +EV -> HOLD.

Real OPRA fills. n=65, total=+$1759.40, OOS-positive. Tight -8% stop slashes maxDD to -$325 (best DD of all 6) but theta chops WR to 26% and edge_capture to +$20 (1% of max, OP-16 REJECT). Validation FAIL (wf=0.524). +EV -> HOLD.
Real OPRA fills. IDENTICAL to OTM-2:control:chart_level. n=63, total=+$4793.72, edge_capture=-$517 (OP-16 REJECT), validation FAIL (wf=0.213). +EV -> HOLD.

Real OPRA fills. n=146, total=+$4613.45, OOS-positive, validation PASS (wf=0.772, sub-window stable). L2 more than doubles trade count (63->146) and lifts edge_capture from -$517 to +$652 (42% of max) -- still under 771 floor -> HOLD not PROMOTE. Worst maxDD -$1257. IDENTICAL to OTM-2:L2:pct_-50.

WINNER. Real OPRA fills. n=159, total=+$2593.09. edge_capture=$1017.63 = 66% of max -> CLEARS OP-16 771 floor. wf=3.99, OOS-positive, validation PASS. L2 gate + tight -8% premium stop sweet spot: tight stop caps anchor-LOSER days, L2 restores volume on anchor-WINNER days -> highest edge_capture in grid. Cost: low WR 20%, lowest exp +$16. maxDD=-$760. Higher EC than ITM-2:L2:pct_-8 ($477). 1.282/day NOT overtrade. PROMOTE.

Real OPRA fills. IDENTICAL to OTM-2:L2:chart_level. n=146, total=+$4613.45, validation PASS (wf=0.772), edge_capture=+$652 (42% of max) -> under 771 -> HOLD. Wide stop lets anchor-LOSER days bleed -> EC below floor. At OTM-2 the TIGHT stop is what lifts EC over 771. Worst maxDD -$1257.

ONLY OTM-1 cell that clears OP-16: edge_capture $946.37 = 61.4% of max, validation PASS (OOS-positive total=$3606, wf=5.63, sub-window stable), n=158/124 days. Tight 8% stop + L2 caps max_dd at -$583. WR 22% theta-trap, exp +$22.82/trade positive. Real OPRA fills, risk-gate assert ON. Better strike than ITM-2 ($477) for this combo.

+EV (exp +$28.89, total +$1878, OOS-positive) but edge_capture only $40.92 (3% of max, below 771) and wf=0.632 <0.70 -> validation FAIL. Tight stop keeps max_dd shallow -$328 but without L2 the engine barely touches anchor winners. HOLD.

Aggregate attractive (exp +$56.69, WR 56%, total +$3571, wf=0.74) BUT edge_capture NEGATIVE -$469.5 (-30% of max) -> engine loses on anchor-loser days more than it captures. OP-16 auto-REJECT (final_score negative). Wide stop blows max_dd -$1630. CROSSED_OFF.
NUMERICALLY IDENTICAL to OTM-1:control:chart_level. Same negative edge_capture -$469.5 -> OP-16 REJECT, -$1630 max_dd. Axis completeness.

+EV (exp +$20.54, total +$3040, OOS-positive, n=148), edge_capture turns POSITIVE +$525.83 (34% of max) under L2 -- still BELOW 771 -> validation FAIL (sub_window not stable). Wide stop drags max_dd to -$1758 (worst of 6). wf=26.6 artifact of tiny IS denom. Tight-stop variant (EC 946 > 526, max_dd -583 > -1758) dominates. HOLD.
NUMERICALLY IDENTICAL to OTM-1:L2:chart_level. edge_capture +$525.83 below 771 -> FAIL -> HOLD. -$1758 max_dd. Axis completeness.

+EV (exp=+$65.6, best WR 60%), OOS-positive (total=+$4132.95, validation_pass=true, wf=0.832). But edge_capture=-$596 (-39% of max) NEGATIVE: without L2 the engine takes large losses on anchor losing days -> fails OP-16 floor -> HOLD. Large maxDD -$1268. chart_level == pct_-50. n=63/56 days. Reproducible.

+EV (exp=+$20.25, total=+$1316.24) OOS-positive but weakest cell: edge_capture=-$30.4 (-2% of max), wf=0.43 (<0.70), validation_pass=FALSE (only cell failing validation). Tight stop chops WR to 23%. Lowest maxDD -$499 of control cells. HOLD on weak +EV, closest to CROSSED_OFF. n=65/56 days.

IDENTICAL to ATM:control:chart_level. edge_capture=-$596 (-39%, fails OP-16) -> HOLD. +EV exp=+$65.6, WR 60%, validation_pass=true, wf=0.832, total=+$4132.95, maxDD -$1268, n=63/56. Axis completeness.

L2 flips edge_capture POSITIVE (+$266.5, +17% of max) vs control -$596 -- L2 filtering anchor losers. +EV (exp=+$30.62, WR 52%), OOS-positive, validation_pass=true, wf=5.221, total=+$4532 (best total in grid). But EC $266.5 < 771 -> HOLD. WORST maxDD in grid -$2158 (wide stop x n=148). chart_level == pct_-50. n=148/124.

BEST cell for ATM and the only near-miss on OP-16: edge_capture=+$732.22 (48% of max) vs 771 threshold -- falls $38.78 short -> HOLD not PROMOTE. +EV (exp=+$21.9), OOS-positive, validation_pass=true, wf=3.454, total=+$3482.77. Tight stop keeps maxDD -$581 but chops WR to 25%. Highest n=159/124. Mirrors ITM-2:L2:pct_-8 shape but EC below floor (ITM-2 $477, OTM-3 cleared $1003).

IDENTICAL to ATM:L2:chart_level. edge_capture=+$266.5 (17% of max, < 771) -> HOLD. exp=+$30.62, WR 52%, validation_pass=true, wf=5.221, total=+$4532, maxDD -$2158 (worst in grid). n=148/124. Axis completeness.

Best ITM-1 cell by edge_capture (30% of max). +EV, OOS-positive, validation PASS (wf 2.32, sub-window stable), maxDD -$655, n=157, total +$2780. BUT edge_capture 464 < 771 floor -> not PROMOTE. Theta trap: WR 24% offset by ITM delta + tight stop. One strike shy of ITM-2:L2:pct_-8 ($477). HOLD.

Higher WR 51% (wide cap lets winners breathe) but edge_capture collapses to ~$1 (0% of max) and maxDD blows to -$2032 (3x the -8% cell) on a $2K account = 100% drawdown. +EV (exp +$16, total +$2325), OOS-positive, validation PASS. EC~0 << 771 -> HOLD. -$2032 maxDD disqualifier for live use at $2K.
IDENTICAL to ITM-1:L2:chart_level. n=148, EC ~$1, maxDD -$2032, wf 2.255, validation PASS. +EV but EC<<771 -> HOLD. Axis completeness.

Highest per-trade expectancy of all 6 control cells (+$48, WR 56%, total +$3027) BUT edge_capture NEGATIVE -$563 (-36% of max): un-patched gate skips J anchor winners / takes anchor losers. validation_pass=FALSE (sub-window fails despite wf 1.52). maxDD -$1304 ~65% of $2K. Aggregate-attractive but anti-J-edge -> HOLD with strong CROSSED_OFF lean.
IDENTICAL to ITM-1:control:chart_level. n=63, EC -$563, exp +$48, maxDD -$1304, wf 1.524, validation_pass=FALSE. Negative edge_capture -> HOLD with CROSSED_OFF lean. Axis completeness.

Tight -8% stop on un-patched gate: smallest maxDD -$537, +EV (exp +$36, total +$2301) but edge_capture marginally NEGATIVE -$14 (-1% of max) AND wf 0.654 < 0.70 -> validation FAIL. The L2 gate (EC +$464) strictly dominates this on the J-edge metric at the same stop. HOLD with CROSSED_OFF lean.

n=62, total=+$4374, OOS-positive, validation PASS. EC=-$626 (-41% of max) << 771 -> NOT PROMOTE. Strongly +EV (exp=+$71/t, WR=55%) so not CROSSED_OFF. Negative EC = no-gate control over-skips J winners while net-+EV -> HOLD. Identical to control:pct_-50.
n=63, total=+$2431, OOS-positive, validation PASS. EC=-$14 (~0% of max) << 771 -> NOT PROMOTE. +EV (exp=+$39/t) and low maxDD -$694 but tight stop crushes WR to 27%. wf=0.90. +EV -> HOLD.
n=62, total=+$4374, OOS-positive, validation PASS. EC=-$626 << 771 -> NOT PROMOTE. IDENTICAL to control:chart_level (both premium_stop_pct=-0.50). +EV -> HOLD.

n=147, total=+$1261, OOS-positive but validation FAIL. EC=-$22 << 771. wf=-9.836 (negative walk-forward) and maxDD=-$3075 (worst of row, ~1.5x a $2K account). exp only +$9/t -> churns 1.2/day for near-zero edge. Marginal-+EV total but fails validation + catastrophic DD + negative wf -> CROSSED_OFF. Identical to L2:pct_-50.

n=157, total=+$4487, OOS-positive, validation PASS. BEST cell of the ITM-2 row: EC=+$477.56 = 31% of max, but < 771 floor -> NOT PROMOTE. Reproduces prompt verified numbers EXACTLY. wf=4.457, +EV (+$29/t) -> HOLD. WR=29% theta trap but expectancy is the edge. Tight -8% + L2 only positive-EC config at this strike, still 60% short of bar. 1.276/day mild.

n=147, total=+$1261, OOS-positive but validation FAIL. EC=-$22 << 771, wf=-9.836, maxDD=-$3075. IDENTICAL to L2:chart_level. Wide -50% cap lets ITM-2 losers run to -$3075 DD -> negative walk-forward -> CROSSED_OFF.

FIRST OP-16 PROMOTE of the search. SHIPPED to shadow lane (read-only, auto-ratify). Core = block_level_rejection:false + tight -8% stop + OTM-1. Invariant: L2+tight-stop captures J edge across ALL strikes; wide-stop bleeds; control misses winners. 2 sim-only tuners excluded (disclosed).

TESTED (J idea): OTM-4 + scale-out 8@$0.40 + 2 runners trailing = HOLD, EC 652 < 771 floor. The scale-out CAPS the big-winner-day capture that the OTM-3:L2:-8% RIDER profits from (EC 1003). On J's source-of-truth, RIDING > SCALPING. +EV but not the edge.
